issues.title: Improve Better-Beads graph authoring ergonomics
issues.description:
## Outcome
Fresh agents can create and dispatch a strong Better-Beads authoring graph.

## Closure contract
Do not close until every direct child is closed or explicitly closed as unnecessary with evidence.

## Validation
```bash
br dep cycles --json
```
Expected: no dependency cycles.

issues.title: Publish graph construction cookbook
issues.description:
## Outcome
Agents have a concise graph construction recipe.

## Success criteria
- Parent-child and blocking dependency semantics are documented.

## Validation
```bash
test -f skills/better-beads/references/GRAPH-CONSTRUCTION-COOKBOOK.md
```
Expected: cookbook exists.

issues.title: Add safe graph draft/apply helper
issues.description:
## Outcome
Agents can dry-run a graph draft before mutation.

## Success criteria
- Dry-run previews issues and dependencies.
- Apply fails closed before mutation on invalid references.

## Validation
```bash
skills/better-beads/scripts/better-beads create-graph --dry-run skills/better-beads/test/fixtures/example-graph.json
```
Expected: JSON preview is parseable.
